mission.title: the-update-framework-tuf-: Start to keep Architectural Decision Records (ADRs) for tuf reference implementation
mission.description:
Fixes #1141, #1125 

**Description of the changes being introduced by the pull request**:

Add initial Architectural Decision Records (ADRs) documenting some workflow decisions before the [refactor](https://github.com/theupdateframework/tuf/projects/2):
1. Use of MADR format to keep ADRs for the reference implementation
2. Decision to adopt Python 3.6+ moving forward (dropping Python 2.7)

**Please verify and check that the pull request fulfills the following
requirements**:

- [ ] The code follows the [Code Style Guidelines](https://github.com/secure-systems-lab/code-style-guidelines#code-style-guidelines)
- [ ] Tests have been added for the bug fix or new feature
- [ ] Docs have been added for the bug fix or new feature

resolution.summary: I'm not sure why the AppVeyor build is failing to find dateutil when other recent builds have successfully run the same tests which are now failing, i.e. AppVeyor run for the 0.15.0 release PR #1183 is [green](https://ci.appveyor.com/project/lukpueh/tuf-fdnro/builds/35873166) while this one is [red](https://ci.appveyor.com/project/lukpueh/tuf-fdnro/builds/35875709)
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
